title: stelis declivis
intro: Stelis declivis, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis declivis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its ability to alleviate pain and reduce fever. Stelis declivis can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety need to be further studied.
